summary: Security Hardening Sprint Iteration 74 - All 10 security endpoints verified. Security readiness 9.7/10 (target 8.5 MET). Go-Live certification shows GO decision. JWT_SECRET rotated to strong key. CORS whitelisted. Webhook secret strong.
critical_code_review_comments: Security engine v2 correctly audits all 9 secrets with strength_check including entropy validation
JWT_SECRET rotated to 86-character strong key with high entropy - passes all 8 JWT security checks
CORS_ORIGINS whitelisted to specific domains (not wildcard '*') - CORS test passes
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET rotated to strong 68-character key - passes strength check
All 10 automated security tests pass including CORS Policy Enforcement
Tenant isolation audit covers 20 collections with proper expected_field validation
seed_data_creation: None - endpoints return real security audit data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security hardening sprint complete. Security readiness 9.7/10 exceeds 8.5 target. Go-Live shows GO decision. All 10 new security endpoints working: GET /api/hardening/security/secrets (v2 with strength_check), /jwt (8 checks all pass), /tenant-isolation (20 collections), /rbac (9 checks), /api-keys (3 keys), /monitoring (5 detection rules), /tests (10/10 pass), /metrics, /readiness (9.7/10). Frontend Security tab shows 6 dimension cards with scores. Go-Live tab shows GO with 9.7 security score. Infrastructure shows degraded (6.7/10) due to no Celery workers in preview - this is expected and documented. Risk analysis correctly identifies Celery workers as only remaining issue.

features_verified.GET_security_secrets: PASS - v2 format with strength_check on each secret
features_verified.GET_security_api_keys: PASS - 3 API keys with good practices
features_verified.JWT_SECRET_strong: PASS - 86 chars, strong entropy, no dangerous defaults
features_verified.activation_tenant_isolation_v2: PASS - uses v2 with expected_field and compliant flag
